summary: W892 keeps the target nonterminal under the immutable original four-task contract while replacing W891's bundled strict preimage map-data family with six explicit constructor fields. The assembled strict preimage map data feeds W891, then W890, W889, W888, W887, W886, W885, W884, W883, W882, W881, W880, and W879. Product success remains false because the explicit W892 fields, the remaining concrete leaves, the final original-four-task witness, and the completion review packet are still incomplete.
known_gaps: Task 4 is not contract-complete under the original four-task contract: W892 exposes the strict preimage map-data family as six explicit fields, but those fields and the other W892 concrete leaves are still not instantiated.

The remaining W892 fields are boundary data, relation data, target surjectivity and compactness, matched selected-difference and mapped-cokernel closedness branch data, strict preimage object fields, strict preimage zero/one component maps, zero/one component factorization equations, left/right naturality squares, identity and composition coherence, source-image normalization, fixed-target uniqueness obligations, triangulated/source-side data, endpoint ExactAt facts, and bounded homotopy localized right-adjoint data.
The final Dbounded MetrizableLCA original four-task completion witness is still missing; ProductSuccessDeclarations and OriginalFourTaskCompletionDeclarations only record nonterminal route evidence.
The completion review packet still lacks the immutable-contract negative-fixture coverage, external SHA256 sidecar, and clean extraction audit required for product success.
remaining_work: Construct or precisely block concrete values for the thirty-four W892 explicit field inputs.
Continue splitting or discharging the remaining bundled providers only when the split is supported by current Lean definitions and provider-search evidence.
Connect the resulting route to a no-argument or fully instance-resolved original four-task completion witness only after all route inputs are real.
Refresh the completion review packet, negative fixtures, manifest, clean extraction audit, and terminal outcome only after the original witness exists.
